posts.author: RyanBY (Ryan BY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Is it possible to point the overview widget to use the groups as different projects to reference the “progress”?

If not, can you think of a way to visualize this?
I have X groups, with a variable number of items within, built out of the timeline, status, and numeric “progress value”,
And I want to provide the user with a visualized snapshot of where each group stands, rather than the entire board.

Any thoughts would be welcome

posts.author: ccoppel (Christina Coppel)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very helpful! Any feedback on options?
